hook.summary: A jump-cut from a grainy 'scary' video to a colorful 3D hide-and-seek game.
hook.visual_action: Grainy black and white footage of a person moving quickly, followed by a transition to a 3D bedroom scene.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!

scene_flow: Starts with a high-contrast, grainy black-and-white clip labeled 'THIS IS TERRIFYING'.
Cuts to a 3D bedroom where a player character is hiding among other NPCs.
The player character transforms into a police officer and performs a dance move.
The character uses a mini-trampoline to jump onto the bed.
The character hides behind a pillow on the bed as the camera zooms in.
on_screen_text: Antony Lore: Somewhere, a better hiding spot is crying
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy hide-and-seek mechanics and humorous, stylized 3D graphics.
